sport.name: Soccer
sport.description: A team sport played between two teams of eleven players with a spherical ball.

sport.name: Basketball
sport.description: A team sport in which two teams, most commonly of five players each, oppose each other on a rectangular court.

sport.name: Tennis
sport.description: A racket sport that can be played individually against a single opponent or between two teams of two players each.

sport.name: Cricket
sport.description: A bat-and-ball game played between two teams of eleven players on a field at the center of which is a 22-yard pitch.
